name: Cailan
description: Gardwen's possessed brother (birth name Gabriel) -- the Baron's tournament champion, host to the ancient dragon-knight spirit Thuban Eta. Dragon-scale armor fused to his skin; eyes flicker reptilian when possessed; fights with uncanny ancient skill and minor fire.
narrative: Kidnapped as a child a decade ago, Gabriel was subjected to Baron Hanzo's possession ritual and bound to Thuban Eta, an ancient dragon-knight spirit. Now called Cailan, he is the Baron's unbeaten tournament champion: unnatural precision with bow and spear, ancient fighting techniques drawn from Thuban's memories, and minor fire abilities channeled through the binding locket. Years of shared consciousness have fractured his mind -- moments of clarity surface between possessions, and Thuban himself sometimes fights the Baron's will. Freeing him is the emotional core of his sister Gardwen's quest.

equipment.name: Dragon-scale armor (fused, all locations)
equipment.notes: AP 5; partially fused to skin; no penalty

extras.real_name: Gabriel (birth name; 'Cailan' is the Baron's title for him)
extras.role: Baron Hanzo's tournament champion; Gardwen's younger brother, kidnapped as a child ~10 years ago and possessed by the bound spirit Thuban Eta.
extras.possession: Shares his mind with [[thuban-eta]]. Eyes shift human<->reptilian under full possession; experiences moments of clarity between possessions; fragmented dual consciousness.
abilities: Ancient dragon-knight fighting techniques (from Thuban's memories)
Unnatural precision with bow and spear
Minor fire abilities (channeled through the binding)
extras.minor_fire: Can wreathe weapon/limbs in flame for +1d4 fire on a successful hit, a few times per scene (Baron's ritual gift). Tied to the binding locket.
extras.vulnerability: Weakening or removing the binding locket / Thuban's remains can free him; appeals to his true identity ('Gabriel') can surface clarity.
extras.magic_tradition: None of his own; fire is the Baron's grafted gift via the binding.
extras.source: GM-authored from source lore (Key Supporting Characters)
